title: hieracium subelegans
intro: Hieracium subelegans, a perennial herbaceous plant of the dandelion family (Asteraceae), is also known as a type of hawk's beard or false hawk's beard due to its resemblance to the true hawk's beard. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subelegans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
